title: Nursery Rhyme. DLXXIV. Natural History.
content:
Hurly, burly, trumpet trase,
        The cow was in the market place,
        Some goes far, and some goes near,
        But where shall this poor henchman steer?
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Unknown delivers a powerful performance in "Nursery Rhyme. DLXXIV. Natural History."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
